criteria.reason: Current task artifacts include a fresh prod-faithful route-to-Jita repro with the request text, plan_route args, iteration count, log signals, and final rendered answer in .agent/tasks/route-to-jita-prod-audit/raw/prod-route-repro.txt and raw/prod-route-log-snapshot.txt.

Current code and task artifacts explain the full execution path from Telegram handler to handleAgentMessage, plan_route, and Telegram-facing formatting, including the local SDE, ESI, zKill, and model-output responsibilities.
The current route flow now separates preferred-route metrics from merged coverage, makes route association explicit, and has targeted regression coverage plus passing build/lint checks.
The fix is narrow and defensible: it stays within src/eve/route-planner.ts and tests/unit/route-planner.test.ts while explicitly addressing the misleading risk summary and danger-section omissions.
Route output remains Telegram-safe and stable with emphasized system names, a fixed-width comparison block, and regression tests that lock the summary shape and data contract.
